title: Armed Actors – Philippines
summary: Multiple armed groups active across Mindanao and the Visayas. Key actors include MILF/Bangsamoro government forces, NPA, Abu Sayyaf, and BIFF.

title: CVE, CT & Stabilization – Somalia
summary: Al-Shabaab operates as both an insurgency and a shadow government across South Central Somalia. Covers CVE program design, stabilization operations, humanitarian access in AS-controlled areas, and defector reintegration.

title: Countering Russian Aggression – Baltics
summary: Russia prosecutes hybrid warfare against Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania through disinformation, cyber attacks, minority community manipulation, infrastructure sabotage, and gray-zone military provocations, backed by conventional military threat. Covers hybrid threat recognition, counter-disinformation, civil resilience, minority engagement, NATO deterrence posture, and field operator security.

title: Reintegrating Child Soldiers
region: Global / Sub-Saharan Africa, South Asia, Middle East
summary: Children associated with armed forces and groups (CAAFAG) require specialized release, interim care, family tracing, psychosocial support, and community reintegration programming. Covers DDR for children, trauma-informed practice, girls associated with armed groups, preventing re-recruitment, and navigating accountability frameworks.

title: Sahel – Armed Actors
summary: Jihadist insurgencies, inter-community violence, and coup-related instability across Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger.

title: Myanmar – Internal Conflict
summary: Post-coup armed resistance, ethnic armed organizations, and humanitarian access constraints across multiple fronts.
